intake_questions.text: Has the organisation completed a formal GRC maturity assessment previously?
Is there a dedicated GRC function or role within the organisation?
Does the organisation use a GRC platform or tool?
Are compliance obligations tracked centrally across all regulatory frameworks?
Is there a board-level risk committee or equivalent governance body?

scope_template.prompt: Identify which organisational domains are in scope for GRC maturity assessment
List GRC tools, risk registers, and compliance management systems in use
Confirm any GRC domains or functions explicitly out of scope

requirements.text: A documented IT and security governance framework aligned to COBIT EDM01 must be established with board-level oversight and clear accountability.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Governance framework document; board committee charter; IT strategy with security objectives; accountability matrix

requirements.text: An enterprise risk management process aligned to COBIT APO12 must be in place with a current risk register, risk appetite statement, and documented treatment decisions.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Risk management policy; risk register; risk appetite statement; treatment plans; residual risk acceptance records

requirements.text: All applicable legal, regulatory and contractual compliance obligations must be identified, tracked, and reported to management with measurable KPIs.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Legal and regulatory register; compliance calendar; compliance KPI dashboard; management reporting samples

requirements.text: An internal audit function or equivalent must conduct periodic control assessments and report findings to leadership with tracked remediation.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Internal audit charter; annual audit plan; audit reports; findings tracker with remediation status

requirements.text: Security operations aligned to COBIT DSS05 must provide monitoring, incident management, and vulnerability management capabilities with documented procedures.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Security operations procedures; monitoring evidence; incident register; vulnerability management records

evidence_requests.title: Governance Framework Documentation
evidence_requests.description: IT governance framework, board/committee charters, and IT strategy with security objectives

evidence_requests.title: Enterprise Risk Register and Treatment Plan
evidence_requests.description: Current risk register with ratings, owners, treatment decisions, and residual risk acceptance records

evidence_requests.title: Compliance Register and Reporting
evidence_requests.description: Legal register, compliance calendar, KPI dashboard, and sample management compliance reports

evidence_requests.title: Internal Audit Charter and Reports
evidence_requests.description: Internal audit charter, most recent audit plan, audit reports, and open findings tracker

evidence_requests.title: Security Operations Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Security operations procedures, monitoring coverage evidence, and incident and vulnerability management records

task_templates.title: Assess governance framework against COBIT EDM01
Evaluate enterprise risk management maturity against COBIT APO12
Review compliance obligation coverage and reporting quality
Assess internal audit function independence and coverage
Evaluate security operations capability against COBIT DSS05
Interview CIO/CISO on GRC function maturity and roadmap
Score GRC maturity against CMMI levels 1-5 per domain

severity_model.critical: GRC function absent or fundamentally broken; immediate regulatory or governance failure risk
severity_model.high: Significant maturity gap (CMMI level 1); key obligations unmet or risk unmanaged
severity_model.medium: Partial maturity gap (CMMI level 2); defined processes exist but inconsistently applied
severity_model.low: Optimisation opportunity (CMMI level 3-4); processes defined but not measured or optimised
severity_model.informational: Best-practice recommendation for CMMI level 5 optimisation

advisory_clinic_templates.title: GRC Governance Design Workshop
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Facilitate governance framework design aligned to COBIT EDM domain; define committee structure and reporting lines

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Risk Appetite Setting Session
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Guide leadership through risk appetite definition and translation into risk tolerance thresholds per domain

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Compliance Horizon Scanning Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review upcoming regulatory changes and assess impact on compliance programme; update legal register
